title: Remove option image upload fields from Add Question modal

requirements.summary: Remove the four option image file picker inputs from the Add Question modal, retaining only the question image picker, correct option selector, and submit button. Update submission logic to pass empty strings for option image data fields while maintaining backend compatibility.
acceptanceCriteria: The Add Question modal shows exactly one image file picker for the question image only.
No file picker inputs labeled Option 1, Option 2, Option 3, or Option 4 are present in the modal.
The correct option selector (radio buttons A/B/C/D) remains in the modal.
The question image file picker still shows a live preview thumbnail when a file is selected.
Submitting the form calls addQuestion with the question image base64 data URI; option image data fields are passed as empty strings to preserve backend function signature compatibility.
On successful submission the modal closes, a success toast is shown, and the question gallery refreshes.
All other modal behaviour (submit button, validation, loading state) remains unchanged.

file_operations.description: Remove all four option image file input fields and their associated state management (optionImages state array, handleOptionImageChange handler, preview rendering). Retain the question image file input with its preview thumbnail. Update the form submission logic in handleSubmit to call the addQuestion mutation with the question image base64 data URI and an array of four empty strings for optionImageData parameter to maintain backend function signature compatibility. Keep the correct option radio button selector (A/B/C/D), Submit button, loading state, success toast, and modal close behavior unchanged.
